text.title: Micro-Agency P&L Tracker Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the weekly snapshot, monthly P&L, and quarterly concentration audit artifacts.

forbidden.pattern: revenue_lines collapsed into single "revenue" line (violates r1)
utilization values derived from estimates rather than time-tracked data
monthly_pnl.closed_by_date later than the 7th of the following month (violates r5)
concentration.top_1_percent > 30 AND alerts_fired contains no concentration_top_1 entry
contractor_margin_per_role missing for any role with hours billed
runway_months reported as "infinite" when retainer base exists — must show actual runway under retainer drop assumptions

allowed-transformations.transformation: Concentration thresholds may be temporarily raised (e.g., during an explicit "land a big client" phase) but the raise must be documented in the alert log with end-date.
For sub-3-person agencies, "contractor_margin" rule applies only to contractors, not to the founder's own work.
"Productized" line may be 0 if the agency hasn't launched productized offerings yet — the line still exists as a placeholder for visibility.

list.item: weekly_snapshot computed each Friday with all 3 revenue lines populated
utilization_per_person is from tracked time, not estimates
concentration computed monthly with named alert thresholds
contractor margin computed per role, not lumped
runway_months stress-tested against top-1 retainer loss
